creator: lichray@gmail.com
text:
This problem has been fixed in version 0.8. The origin PR is at:
	https://code.google.com/p/sumatrapdf/issues/detail?id=1180&can=1
	and I have tested the latest mupdf with the sample PDF. The malformed
	pdf is properly handled, and valgrind shows nothing harmful.

Fix: 

Remark the vulnerable to version < 8.
